name: unix-timestamp-pro
title: Unix Timestamp Pro
description: Convert Unix timestamps to readable date formats for major timezones worldwide. Support China, USA, Poland, Indonesia, Mexico, Philippines and more.
author: geoqiao

commands.name: convert-timestamp
commands.title: Convert Timestamp to Date
commands.subtitle: Unix Timestamp Pro
commands.description: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable date formats for any timezone

commands.name: generate-timestamp
commands.title: Generate Timestamp from Date
commands.subtitle: Unix Timestamp Pro
commands.description: Create Unix timestamps from human-readable dates and times in selected timezone

commands.name: current-timestamp
commands.title: Get Current Timestamp
commands.subtitle: Unix Timestamp Pro
commands.description: Copy current Unix timestamp to clipboard

preferences.name: timestampUnit
preferences.title: Timestamp Unit
preferences.description: Unit for the Current Timestamp command
